## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `agentmx ...`
2. Press ...
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 22.0.0]
- AgentMX version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- Agent(s) used: [e.g., claude-code, codex]

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or debug logs (`/tmp/agentmx-debug.log`).
